name: Great Sand Sea - Gold Golgonda
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>砂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゴールド・ゴルゴンダ
desc: All "Springans" Xyz Monsters on the field gain 1000 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Great Sand Sea - Gold Golgonda" once per turn. If you control no "Springans" Xyz Monsters: You can discard 1 "Springans" card; Special Summon 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck. If a face-up Xyz Monster you control leaves the field by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack for the rest of this turn (even if this card leaves the field).
eff: All "Springans" Xyz Monsters on the field gain 1000 ATK. You can only use each of the following effects of "Great Sand Sea - Gold Golgonda" once per turn. If you control no "Springans" Xyz Monsters: You can discard 1 "Springans" card; Special Summon 1 "Springans" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck. If a face-up Xyz Monster you control leaves the field by card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack for the rest of this turn (even if this card leaves the field).

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
